meta.title: Our Services
meta.description: Nexos Real Estate services — property consultancy, investment guidance, property valuation, rental management and more. Trusted real estate solutions in North Cyprus.

hero.title: Professional Real Estate
hero.description: End-to-end professional consultancy for property buying, selling, renting and investing in North Cyprus. We are with you every step of the way.

servicesSection.title: Our Services
servicesSection.description: Comprehensive real estate solutions tailored to your needs

saleConsultancy.title: Property Sales Consultancy
saleConsultancy.description: We provide comprehensive consultancy to help you find your dream property in North Cyprus. We are by your side at every stage, from needs analysis to title deed transfer.

features.f4: Title deed research and legal verification

rentalServices.title: Rental Property Services
rentalServices.description: We provide professional support to both property owners and tenants in residential and commercial rental processes.

investmentConsultancy.title: Investment Consultancy
investmentConsultancy.description: We analyze high-return opportunities in the North Cyprus real estate market and develop your investment strategy together.

propertyValuation.title: Property Valuation
propertyValuation.description: We determine the true market value of your property with professional valuation reports, providing a solid foundation for your buying and selling decisions.

projectMarketing.title: Project Marketing
projectMarketing.description: We offer tailored marketing solutions for developers and project owners, connecting your projects with the right buyer audience.

features.f3: Digital marketing and social media management

legalSupport.title: Legal Support Coordination
legalSupport.description: We work in coordination with our expert lawyer network for legal procedures in real estate transactions, protecting your rights throughout the process.

features.f2: Title deed type research and verification
features.f4: Council of Ministers permit application tracking

renovationGuidance.title: Renovation and Interior Design Guidance
renovationGuidance.description: We collaborate with trusted renovation and design firms to increase your property's value or personalize your living space.

relocationGuidance.title: Living and Relocation Guidance
relocationGuidance.description: We offer comprehensive relocation guidance for those considering moving to North Cyprus, ensuring a smooth transition to your new life.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Become a property owner in 4 steps

step1.title: Needs Analysis
step1.description: We evaluate your budget, location, property type and expectations in detail.

step2.title: Property Selection
step2.description: We filter properties matching your criteria and organize on-site viewings.

step3.title: Negotiation and Contract
step3.description: We handle price negotiation and prepare the contract with lawyer review.

step4.title: Title Deed and Handover
step4.description: We follow the title deed transfer process and deliver your property seamlessly.

whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.description: With over 10 years of experience in the North Cyprus real estate sector, we provide our clients with reliable, transparent and results-driven service. We transform every property transaction into a personalized experience.

reliable.title: Reliable and Transparent
reliable.description: We ensure open communication and legal assurance in all transactions.

personalized.title: Personalized Service
personalized.description: We provide custom needs analysis and solutions for every client.

valuation.title: Accurate Valuation
valuation.description: We perform realistic property valuations based on market data.

localExpertise.title: Local Expertise
localExpertise.description: You work with the team that knows Iskele and its surroundings best.

cta.title: Let's Find Your Dream Property Together
cta.description: Get in touch for a free consultation. Our expert team is ready to answer all your questions.
